sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93996" key="si/deios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σίδειος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">σίδη</etym>) <sense id="n93996.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of the pomegranate</tr_>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:1:135" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.135</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
